title: Surgeon Vacancy at AstraZeneca India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at AstraZeneca India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
AstraZeneca India has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About AstraZeneca India:
AstraZeneca India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AstraZeneca India!
